debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
⊢ onto f ↔ range f = Univ V

proof:
by
  constructor
  · intro honto
    ext y
    constructor
    · intro hy
      trivial
    · intro _
      rcases honto y with ⟨x, rfl⟩
      exact ⟨x, rfl⟩
  · intro hrange
    intro y
    have : y ∈ range f := by
      have : y ∈ Univ V := trivial
      simpa [hrange] using this
    rcases this with ⟨x, rfl⟩
    exact ⟨x, rfl⟩
